generationRule.title: Home
generationRule.navigation: Root ListModel.LayoutView.sort[] should include Type 103 item whose ListID is the Home LayoutID.

errors: DASHBOARD_USES_LEGACY_SCHEMA when generated Type 103 has blank LayoutView or missing Ext2 src marker and no resources
Existing ROOT_APP_PAGE_RESOURCE_MISSING still applies when empty resources do not match current shell
warnings: Rich current-dashboard content remains unproven until a current dashboard with controls is exported.

schemaDriftNote: The supplied product-team JSON schema still declares LayoutView as string, but the v1.93 export-proven current dashboard shell uses LayoutView null.
